design_brief.goal: Convert homeowners into paying customers for professional mowing and landscaping services through trust-building and clear lead capture
design_brief.audience: Homeowners who value curb appeal and are willing to pay for professional mowing and landscaping services

visual_direction.layout: Hero-driven layout with prominent visual proof, clear service hierarchy, and strategic lead capture points without overwhelming the experience
visual_direction.typography: Clean, readable sans-serif with strong hierarchy — avoid cursive for body text, use it only sparingly for accents if at all
visual_direction.color_usage: Nature-inspired palette that conveys growth and professionalism — greens for trust and growth, earth tones for reliability, with premium accent colors
visual_direction.motion: Subtle, purposeful animations that enhance credibility — slow, controlled transitions that don't auto-advance galleries too quickly
visual_direction.density: Spacious layout that feels premium and allows visual work to breathe, avoiding cramped corporate layouts

content_priorities: Visual proof of quality work through gallery
Trust signals and social proof through testimonials
Clear service offerings focused on lawn and landscape only
avoid: Auto-advancing image sliders that move too fast
Diluting focus with unrelated services like pool cleaning or pest control
Generic stock photos instead of actual work examples
open_questions: What specific geographic area or service radius should be emphasized in messaging?
Are there seasonal service offerings (like snow removal) that should be highlighted differently?

tech_recommendations.reason: Content-heavy site benefits from a CMS for easy updates
Already configured — free tier, CDN, instant deploys
Contact forms on static sites need a form backend service

style_fingerprint.mood: fresh and grounded, deep grass-green with sun-warmed accents
